title: Lesson: Pós-Flop IP vs CBet (BTN) + 3Bet Pots Postflop + Check-Raise
plan: Read current lesson_classifier.py to understand existing stubs for lessons 19, 20, 23
Implement _eval_ip_vs_cbet() evaluation method for Lesson 20 (Pós-Flop IP vs CBet BTN) with board texture and hand strength analysis
Implement _eval_facing_checkraise() evaluation method for Lesson 19 (Enfrentando Check-Raise) handling flop and turn scenarios
Implement _eval_3bet_pot_postflop() evaluation method for Lesson 23 (3Bet Pots Postflop) with position-aware decision scoring
Wire all 3 lessons in classify() method with proper detection conditions and position/action filters
Add comprehensive tests for all 3 eval methods and detection logic (~60 new tests)
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build)
Update tracking files (active.md, prd.json, batch task file) and commit
